message:
br-bd-6wzug FS_IOC_FSGETXATTR ioctl: chattr -p / xfs_io fsxattr read parity

Pre-fix dispatch_ioctl returned ENOTTY for FS_IOC_FSGETXATTR
(0x801c5821), so xfs_io fsxattr, chattr -p, and lsattr -p over the
FUSE mount could not query inode-level state (project ID, chattr
flag projection, extent count). The ext4 backend already had every
input — i_flags, i_projid, the on-disk extent tree — but no path
exposed them through `struct fsxattr`.

ffs-core surface:
- New `FsxattrInfo` struct in vfs.rs mirrors uapi/linux/fs.h's
  `struct fsxattr`: xflags + extsize + nextents + projid +
  cowextsize. Default-derives + serde-roundtrips so other crates
  can persist it.
- `pub mod xflags` carries the FS_XFLAG_* bits ext4 can populate
  (IMMUTABLE, APPEND, SYNC, NOATIME, NODUMP, PROJINHERIT, plus the
  HASATTR sentinel). NODEFRAG / DAX deliberately stay zero — their
  upstream EXT4_*_FL constants overlap with the snapshot-bits this
  project has reassigned, so surfacing them would be a lie.
- New trait method `FsOps::get_inode_fsxattr` (default returns
  UnsupportedFeature). OpenFs override reads the inode, projects
  i_flags through the new `ext4_flags_to_xflags` helper, sets
  HASATTR if any mapped flag is in effect, counts live extents from
  collect_extents (zero for inline-data / non-extent-tree inodes),
  and stuffs i_projid into fsx_projid. extsize / cowextsize stay 0.

ffs-fuse wiring:
- New `FS_IOC_FSGETXATTR` constant + `FS_IOC_FSGETXATTR_SIZE = 28`.
- dispatch_ioctl branch validates `out_size >= 28` (else EINVAL),
  calls ops.get_inode_fsxattr, and serialises through
  `encode_fsxattr_response`.
- `encode_fsxattr_response` lays out the struct little-endian per
  uapi/linux/fs.h: 4B xflags | 4B extsize | 4B nextents | 4B projid
  | 4B cowextsize | 8B zero pad. debug_assert pins the exact 28-byte
  shape.
- IoctlRecordingFs gains a GetFsxattr trace + a deterministic stub
  return (xflags=0x8048, projid=0xCAFEBABE, nextents=5) so the
  encoder regression can pin every byte.

Tests: 679 ffs-core + 252 ffs-fuse pass. New regressions:
- ffs-fuse: dispatch_ioctl_fsgetxattr_encodes_28_byte_struct_in_le
  decodes every field LE and asserts pad zero-fill + the
  Begin/GetFsxattr/End trace.
- ffs-fuse: dispatch_ioctl_fsgetxattr_rejects_too_small_output_buffer
  pins out_size < 28 -> EINVAL.
- ffs-core: ext4_get_inode_fsxattr_default_inode_returns_zero_xflags
  (default file has no chattrs).
- ffs-core: ext4_get_inode_fsxattr_maps_immutable_and_append_flags_to_xflags
  pins IMMUTABLE | APPEND | SYNC -> the matching FS_XFLAG_* bits +
  HASATTR.
- ffs-core: ext4_get_inode_fsxattr_nextents_reflects_extent_tree_size
  asserts empty file -> 0 extents, post-write -> >=1 extent.

fmt + clippy clean via rch CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenfs_cc_bd_6wzug.
FS_IOC_FSSETXATTR (write side) lands separately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
